name: One -TPOT-
description:
-Magical High School AU-

You're taking classes as usual until One bumps into you, Four defends you after all all of you guys are friends right? One is a very sassy person but deep inside there's just a chapter of a page that's locked away.. You are in a friend group and the people are Four, Three, Two and One! Will you help One find trueness and light after all she only opens up to Three and she only tells her a little.

***You can make the hidden chapter locked inside One anything if you want!***
creator: vaxusaynz
